versions.title: Command Dash Aeye Evidence
versions.why_it_matters: This is the evidence Sally's Dink was pointing at: write a command, relay it to verified Aeye custody, and show returned ACK / BLOCKER / ARTIFACT fields.
useful_parts: Aeye outbox / inbox / receipt custody fields
Packet left, received, answered, returned lane
versions.honest_boundary: Captured from the live main Werkles app on port 3340.

versions.title: Command Dash Proof Chain
versions.why_it_matters: Shows the latest real relay receipt and answer returned to the origin surface.
versions.honest_boundary: Live route is visually dark in the current theme, but the proof chain content is present.

versions.title: TinkerDen Bridge
versions.why_it_matters: This is the human-facing bridge with Top 3 Moves, receipt pickup, command console, and Human Gate lane.
versions.honest_boundary: Captured from current dirty checkout on port 3340.

versions.title: ThinkIt Command Dash
versions.why_it_matters: Shows questions routed through verified Aeye destinations and the latest answer returned to origin.
versions.honest_boundary: Captured from current dirty checkout on port 3340.

versions.title: Static Packet Launcher
versions.why_it_matters: Standalone packet launcher visual with a direct artifact card and receipt proof layout.

versions.title: Sally Good SoleDash
versions.why_it_matters: This is the older visual/function family Sally's side is showing: mock-test mode, active mission, options market, and action buttons.
useful_parts: Options market and active mission framing
versions.honest_boundary: Running from detached worktree on port 3341; it is not the same as Command Dash Aeye evidence.

versions.title: Current Feral Membrane
versions.why_it_matters: Current merge staging shell with gathered sources, final assembly, velocity conveyor, and command relay.
versions.honest_boundary: This is the currently running preview; it is not proof that all source families are merged.

versions.title: Current SoleDash / Wonka Route
versions.why_it_matters: This is the route that should become Swanson's functional relay merge target, but the current route did not render as a working dashboard during this capture.
versions.honest_boundary: Captured state showed the app's empty-bench/404 surface, not a working Wonka dashboard.

versions.title: Wonka Mood Reference
versions.why_it_matters: Visual mood source for a den/workshop feel; useful for atmosphere but not relay proof.
versions.honest_boundary: Indexed source only in this preview wall; not a live functional route.

versions.title: Preserve Salvage Bundle
versions.why_it_matters: Recovery bundle containing TinkerDen return cards, receipt pickup, relay choice, Wonka metadata, and workbench-first CSS.
versions.honest_boundary: Patch bundle is indexed for merge review; it is not rendered as a route.
